'''The Emperor's physician''' was [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] personal medical care provider during his return in the form of several [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] bodies.

==Biography==
Despite the prestige of his position, as one of the few beings close enough to the reborn [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] at the [[Emperor's Citadel|Imperial Citadel]] on [[Byss/Legends|Byss]], the physician became complacent and wished for more power and wealth for himself. Taking a very large bribe from [[Carnor Jax]], an overly-ambitious [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Imperial Royal Guardsman]], the physician tampered with all of the Emperor's remaining clone bodies causing them to age much faster than was normal. In a final act of betrayal, he sabotaged the genetic source material making it impossible to create new copies without the defect.

In a quest to find a fresh body, Palpatine left Byss to try and inhabit that of [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia's]] newborn son [[Anakin Solo|Anakin]]. The physician was brought along. In an attempt to throw his soul into the baby, Palpatine's spirit was trapped by [[Empatojayos Brand]] and he finally surrendered to the abyss. Seeing the Emperor finally perish at the hand of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] frontmen brought great guilt upon the physician. He was captured by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and his allies, and confessed his part in the conspiracy. Unbeknownst to him, an Imperial Royal Guardsman heard the confession and brought the news, including the treachery of Carnor Jax, to remaining peers on [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]].

==Behind the scenes==
Some fans have identified the Emperor's physician with [[Sigit Ranth]], but this has never been mentioned in any canonical source and is strictly [[fanon]]. Note that although the physician was indeed Palpatine's primary care provider, he was a physician, not a [[Clone Master/Legends|Clone Master]]; that role belonged to the [[Constable of Homunculi]], still another separate character.
